text.title: user-story-mapping Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for user-story-mapping as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Activities expressed as feature names ("Search", "Checkout", "Profile") instead of verb-phrases in user voice ("Find a product", "Complete purchase", "Manage account settings").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Noun-names produce a 2D Jira view. Verb-phrases reveal journey sequence, user goals, and gaps. The activity-extractor must be constrained to reject noun-only activities.

failure-mode.description: Vertical priority dimension collapses to ranks 1, 2, 3 with no forcing function. Everything ends up in R1.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a release line tied to capacity (story-points sum / velocity × sprints <= 1.0), priority is aspirational. The release-slicer must compute and enforce the capacity constraint.

failure-mode.description: Multi-persona stories merged into one map from the start ("shoppers + admins" in the same backbone).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Merged maps produce one-size-fits-none stories. Different personas have different journey sequences and different definitions of "essential". Always start per-persona; merge only after each is stable.

failure-mode.description: Walking skeleton inflation: R1 padded with "delight" stories because they are "already built".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Walking skeleton = minimum to validate the outcome metric. Every non-essential R1 item must provide a removal justification. The opus slicer must request this justification when adding stories beyond the minimum.

failure-mode.description: Workshop produces 200 stickies; nobody transcribes them within 24 hours. Map exists only on a wall or whiteboard.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Untranscribed workshops are effectively lost within days. Digitize to map.yaml within 24 hours; the workshop is prep for the canonical artifact, not the artifact itself.

failure-mode.description: Story-rewriter emits 7 acceptance-criteria scenarios for a 1-point story.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AC inflation bloats test-plan.md and slows CI. Cap at 3 GWT scenarios per story; additional scenarios go to a nice_to_have_ac bucket for later.

failure-mode.description: Backbone activities reordered by agents on every run, causing downstream task and story churn.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin backbone order as immutable for the cycle. Require explicit unfreeze flag to reorder. Agents must reject re-orderings that were not explicitly requested.
